reviews.comment:
Reservamos hospedaje unas horas antes telefónicamente, nos atendió Ivan que fue quien nos recibió amablemente sobre el fin de su turno. El precio para socios super razonable para una habitacion limpia, toallas, cochera y desayuno incluído antes de salir con opciones de café, medialunas, yogur y agua. Excelente opción para pasar la noche y seguir viaje, con los estándares garantizados por ACA.

(Translated by Google)
We booked accommodation a few hours earlier by phone, and Ivan, who greeted us warmly at the end of his shift, helped us. The price for members was very reasonable for a clean room, towels, parking, and breakfast included before departure, with options for coffee, croissants, yogurt, and water. An excellent option for spending the night and continuing our trip, with the standards guaranteed by ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2bnRTM29nRRAB
